untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'fast-line hook pattern' (price action pattern) which is not expressible with available indicators. Also requires tracking of MACD divergence confirmation over minimum candles and line separation threshold — these require multi-bar state tracking not supported by simple 3-field condition syntax. The 'fast-line hook' is a visual/contextual price pattern that cannot be reduced to standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using MACD fast line (macd) vs slow line (macd_signal) separation with histogram threshold. However, the core 'hook pattern' requirement and multi-candle divergence confirmation logic cannot be fully expressed. This signal would require custom pattern recognition logic or an additional 'pattern_detected' indicator.
